description:
Returns grid size based on screen resolution and configs: <syntaxhighlight lang="cpp" inline>uiScaleFactor</syntaxhighlight>, <syntaxhighlight lang="cpp" inline>uiScaleMaxGrids</syntaxhighlight>.
As mentioned in the name of this command, '''the user interface scale is ignored'''.
name: pixelGridNoUIScale

ret.desc: grid size, see [[Arma 3: Pixel Grid System]]
